name: Sarah Chen
thesis: Multi-omic integration methods for identifying disease biomarkers in longitudinal cohort studies
transitionSignals: LinkedIn profile updated to 'Open to Work'
Published review on industry applications of multi-omics
description: Sarah is a 5th-year PhD candidate developing computational pipelines for integrating proteomics, metabolomics, and transcriptomics data. She has collaborated with Thermo Fisher on mass spectrometry data analysis workflows.
